reasons: Deflated Sharpe is 0.75 (< 0.95): after correcting for 4 trial(s) and fat tails, the edge is not convincingly positive.
Bootstrap P(SR<=0) is 0.04: the Sharpe stays positive across resamples (selection-blind: a cherry-picked curve can still look good here).
80% of walk-forward folds are positive: performance is reasonably stable across time (selection-blind).
PBO is 0.00 (< 0.50): the in-sample winner tends to hold up out of sample.

description: Cash-and-carry (long spot / short perp) funding harvest.
